Question: What's the RPS/CES commitment in the policy and what's the year by which the commitment must be met? Do not provide with any explanation.

RPS Goal IV: For calendar years 2023 and 2024, inclusive, an average of 12 percent of total electric energy
sold in the base year, and in calendar year 2025, 15 percent of total electric energy sold in the base year.
A utility may not apply renewable energy certificates issued pursuant to subsection J to meet more than 20
percent of the sales requirement for the RPS Goal in any year.
A utility may apply renewable energy sales achieved or renewable energy certificates acquired during the
periods covered by any such RPS Goal that are in excess of the sales requirement for that RPS Goal to the
sales requirements for any future RPS Goals in the five calendar years after the renewable energy was
generated or the renewable energy certificates were created, except that a utility shall be able to apply
renewable energy certificates acquired by the utility prior to January 1, 2014.

participating utility.
